title: calonemorchis gladiolata
intro: Calonemorchis gladiolata, also known as the gladiolus orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The gladiolus orchid has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Calonemorchis gladiolata typically involve the root and rhizome, which are used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
